assumptions.description: Modern high-end GPU cluster or custom ASIC speed estimate

MD5.context: At 1e+10 hashes/sec, a birthday attack on MD5 (n=128) requires 2^64 evaluations, taking approx 5.85e+01 years.

SHA-1.context: At 1e+10 hashes/sec, a birthday attack on SHA-1 (n=160) requires 2^80 evaluations, taking approx 3.83e+06 years.
